_meta.review_warning: AI-drafted v0. DO NOT USE IN PRODUCTION until reviewed by a qualified Vic WHS practitioner and approved.

hazards.title: Impalement on protruding reinforcing steel
hazards.risk: Worker falling onto / brushing past exposed bar ends

controls.title: Plastic caps (mushrooms) on every exposed bar end at all times
Clear access paths within reinforcement mat; no jumping/walking on bars

hazards.title: Cuts from cut bar ends + tie wire
hazards.risk: Sharp bar ends and tie wire snags

controls.title: Long sleeve at all times in reo placement

hazards.title: Manual handling — reo bars / mesh
hazards.risk: Long bars awkward to carry; mesh sheets heavy

controls.title: Two-person carry for bars > 3m or mesh sheets

hazards.title: Bar bender pinch / strain
hazards.risk: Hand/finger pinch in mechanical bar bender

controls.title: Bender operated per manufacturer's instructions; hands clear of pinch points

tasks: Pre-start: formwork inspection signed off; engineering drawings on site.
Establish lay-down area for bars and mesh; cut to length offsite or in designated area.
Place mat per drawings: bottom mat → bond beam → vertical bars → top mat.
Tie at every intersection per spec.
Install starter bars for any adjacent slabs / coping.
Cap every exposed bar end with plastic mushroom cap.
Confirm cover (bar to form) per spec using bar chairs.
Engineer / supervisor inspection HOLD POINT before pour.
